title: Cyber50 Dashboard
shortDescription: A comprehensive cybersecurity analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization.
description: Cyber50 is an interactive cyber security dashboard built with Angular 17 and D3.js to visualize cyber attack incidents through dynamic charts and geographic data. The application provides multiple analytical views including attack types, targeted countries, affected sectors, and global attack flows using interactive visualizations such as bar charts, pie charts, timelines, and a world map.It features a unified filtering system that allows real-time data exploration by date, country, severity, and attack type. The dashboard also includes CSV export, responsive design, and dark mode support.  Technologies used: Angular 17 (Standalone Components), D3.js v7, Tailwind CSS, with incident data served from GitHub Pages JSON endpoints.

title: FreshCart E-Commerce
shortDescription: A full-featured e-commerce platform with JWT authentication and REST API integration.
description: FreshCart is a modern e-commerce web application built with Angular 17. It features a fully functional product catalog, shopping cart, checkout flow, and user authentication via JWT tokens. The app integrates with a RESTful API backend and implements interceptors for token management, route guards for protected pages, and a responsive UI built with Tailwind CSS.

title: AI Plant Disease Detection
shortDescription: A machine learning application for detecting plant diseases from leaf images using CNN.
description:
Developed an AI-powered plant disease detection system as my graduation project, using Deep Learning and Computer Vision techniques. The system analyzes leaf images and accurately identifies the type of disease affecting the plant, helping farmers take timely action.

Built a custom CNN model using TensorFlow & Keras, trained on the PlantVillage dataset with 70,295 images across 38 disease categories. The model achieved 99.2% training accuracy and 96.6% validation accuracy over 20 epochs.

Deployed a user-friendly web application using Streamlit, allowing users to upload or capture plant images and receive instant diagnosis with confidence scores and treatment recommendations.

Tech Stack: Python · TensorFlow · Keras · CNN · NumPy · Matplotlib · Streamlit
